form.label: DNS dnstap Overview
form.description: Always-on DNS query/response telemetry from InfoBlox via dnstap. Click a server slice or a client bar to filter every panel; reset with "All servers" or a * in Client IP.

search.query: index=dns_dnstap sourcetype="dnscollector:json" | stats count by dnstap.identity | sort dnstap.identity

panel.title: Events by DNS server (click to filter all panels)

search.query: index=dns_dnstap sourcetype="dnscollector:json" | stats count by dnstap.identity

index=dns_dnstap sourcetype="dnscollector:json" dnstap.identity=$identity$ dnstap.operation=CLIENT_QUERY | stats count earliest(_time) as t0 latest(_time) as t1 | eval QPS=round(count/max(t1-t0,1),2) | fields QPS

index=dns_dnstap sourcetype="dnscollector:json" dnstap.identity=$identity$ dnstap.operation=CLIENT_RESPONSE dnstap.latency>0 | stats count(eval('dnstap.latency'<0.002)) as hits count as total | eval cache_hit_pct=if(total>0, round(100*hits/total,1), 0) | fields cache_hit_pct
index=dns_dnstap sourcetype="dnscollector:json" dnstap.identity=$identity$ dnstap.operation=CLIENT_RESPONSE dns.rcode=NXDOMAIN | stats count

index=dns_dnstap sourcetype="dnscollector:json" dnstap.identity=$identity$ dnstap.operation=CLIENT_QUERY | timechart span=$span$ count by dnstap.identity | foreach * [eval <<FIELD>>=round('<<FIELD>>'/_span,2)] | fields - _span
index=dns_dnstap sourcetype="dnscollector:json" dnstap.identity=$identity$ dnstap.operation=CLIENT_RESPONSE | timechart span=$span$ count by dns.rcode

index=dns_dnstap sourcetype="dnscollector:json" dnstap.identity=$identity$ dnstap.operation=CLIENT_RESPONSE dnstap.latency>0 | timechart span=$span$ avg(dnstap.latency) as avg_s p95(dnstap.latency) as p95_s | eval avg_ms=round(avg_s*1000,2), p95_ms=round(p95_s*1000,2) | fields _time avg_ms p95_ms
index=dns_dnstap sourcetype="dnscollector:json" dnstap.identity=$identity$ dnstap.operation=CLIENT_QUERY | top limit=$topn_domains$ dns.qname showperc=false

panel.title: Top $topn_rclients$ recursive clients (recursion-desired queries, any name/type)

search.query: index=dns_dnstap sourcetype="dnscollector:json" dnstap.identity=$identity$ dnstap.operation=CLIENT_QUERY dns.flags.rd=true | top limit=$topn_rclients$ network.query-ip showperc=false

panel.title: Top $topn_talkers$ clients by query volume — ANY query (click to isolate)

search.query: index=dns_dnstap sourcetype="dnscollector:json" dnstap.identity=$identity$ dnstap.operation=CLIENT_QUERY | top limit=$topn_talkers$ network.query-ip showperc=false

panel.title: Query rate by client — flood/DDoS spike view (top 5 + other)

search.query: index=dns_dnstap sourcetype="dnscollector:json" dnstap.identity=$identity$ dnstap.operation=CLIENT_QUERY network.query-ip=$client$ | timechart span=$span$ limit=5 useother=true count by network.query-ip

panel.title: Rogue-client signals for $client$ — volume, name spread, NXDOMAIN ratio (click a row to isolate)

search.query: index=dns_dnstap sourcetype="dnscollector:json" dnstap.identity=$identity$ dnstap.operation IN (CLIENT_QUERY, CLIENT_RESPONSE) network.query-ip=$client$ | stats count(eval('dnstap.operation'="CLIENT_QUERY")) as queries dc(dns.qname) as distinct_names count(eval('dns.rcode'="NXDOMAIN")) as nxdomains values(dnstap.identity) as dns_server by network.query-ip | eval nxdomain_pct=if(queries>0, round(100*nxdomains/queries,1), 0) | sort -queries | head $topn_rogue$ | table network.query-ip queries distinct_names nxdomains nxdomain_pct dns_server
index=dns_dnstap sourcetype="dnscollector:json" dnstap.identity=$identity$ dnstap.operation=CLIENT_QUERY network.query-ip=$client$ | top limit=$topn_cnames$ dns.qname showperc=false

panel.title: Top $topn_nx$ NXDOMAIN names (possible typos / DGA / misconfig)

search.query: index=dns_dnstap sourcetype="dnscollector:json" dnstap.identity=$identity$ network.query-ip=$client$ dnstap.operation=CLIENT_RESPONSE dns.rcode=NXDOMAIN | stats count by dnstap.identity, dns.qname, network.query-ip | sort -count | head $topn_nx$
